seoTitle: Marino vs Marion — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Marino and Marion. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marino and Marion.
heading: Marino vs Marion — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marino, South Australia and Marion, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marino has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Marion (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marino or Marion safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marino has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Marion scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marino scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Marion scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marino or Marion?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marino has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.32% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
